memories.value: First run. Survey available product announcements, feature releases, and deal feedback to establish an initial industry landscape baseline.
No landscape baselines established yet. Will build market participant profiles and feature parity snapshots from first 3 runs of data.
No feature gap tracker initialized yet. Will catalog gaps by parity category after initial landscape survey and deal loss correlation.
No market patterns identified yet. Will learn industry announcement cycles, positioning shift indicators, and deal impact correlations over time.
